summary: Tightened the qd report checker so committed qd run records must reference known nodes and use the accepted run kind and status vocabularies.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects roadmap/qd-export.json runs[] entries whose node_id is non-empty but does not match a node in the export.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates non-empty string runs[].node_id values against the export node id set; evidence/m4-qd-run-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-node-id.log records a temporary export copy failing with the expected unknown-node error.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects unknown runs[].kind values outside implement, audit, ci, and merge.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates runs[].kind values against implement, audit, ci, and merge; evidence/m4-qd-run-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-kind.log records a temporary export copy failing with kind=blocker.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects unknown runs[].status values outside completed, failed, passed, and recorded.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates runs[].status values against completed, failed, passed, and recorded; evidence/m4-qd-run-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-status.log records a temporary export copy failing with status=blocked.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Current reports/export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-run-schema-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing with the new reports included.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Record evidence under evidence/m4-qd-run-schema-contract including just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check if available, negative smokes, and git diff --check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains separate logs for qd-reports-check, just check, three temporary-copy negative smokes, and git diff --check.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Add reports/qd/m4-qd-run-schema-contract/completion.json and audit.json with nodeId matching the directory and commits[] empty until after merge unless qd tooling requires otherwise.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: reports/qd/m4-qd-run-schema-contract/completion.json and reports/qd/m4-qd-run-schema-contract/audit.json both use nodeId=m4-qd-run-schema-contract; completion commits[] is empty.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, macOS, hardware, capture, transport, decode, render, or latency behavior is claimed.
